question: Among Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, and Montgomery counties, which have population under 900,000 in the census of the year before the year (within 2017-2022) that has the lowest total ridership reported by the Rochester Genesee Regional Transportation Authority and are not in the Houston metropolitan area?
